channel.title: United States Air Force on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in United States Air Force on Alien Truth Social

item.title: The Flying Saucers Are Real
item.description:
Donald Keyhoe’s 1950 book, The Flying Saucers Are Real, investigated United States Air Force reports of UFOs between 1947 and 1950. The book, which followed a similar article published in True magazine, popularized many ideas in ufology. Keyhoe argued that the Air Force had a policy of concealing UFO existence until 1949, after which it shifted to gradual revelation. He also contended that Earth had been visited by extraterrestrials for two centuries, with increased activity after the 1945 atomic bomb test.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Flying_Saucers_Are_Real

item.title: Project Sign report
item.description:
Project Sign, also known as Project Saucer, was a U.S. Air Force study of unidentified flying objects active for most of 1948. Established to collect and evaluate UFO sighting information due to potential national security concerns, it was the precursor to Project Grudge. A public paper released in 1949 stated that while some UFOs appeared to be actual aircraft, their origins could not be determined due to insufficient data. The project investigated claims related to inventor Jonathan Edward Caldwell’s disk-rotor aircraft, but found they could not explain the widespread “flying saucer” reports.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Project_Sign
